name: Apple 'n' Honey Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Lightly spray a large cookie sheet with nonstick cooking spray or grease lightly.
3. In a bowl, mix flour, wheat germ, baking powder, ground cinnamon, ground nutmeg, baking soda, and salt (if using).
4. Cut in margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Add apples, milk, and honey; mix just until dry ingredients are moistened.
6. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead gently 5 to 6 times.
7. Pat dough into an approximately 9-inch circle.
8. Mix topping ingredients (wheat germ, sugar, ground cinnamon) together.
9. Sprinkle the mixture over the dough.
10. Cut the dough into 10 wedges.
11. Place the wedges about 1/2 inch apart on the prepared cookie sheet.
12. Bake for 16 to 18 minutes or until light golden brown.
Per serving: 220 calories; 6g protein, 34g carbs, 7g fat, 0mg cholesterol, 210mg sodium.
